1:
You have been invited to take part in the Iron Culinarian Challenge as part of the Moonfire Faire festivities. Procure yourself some freshly caught haddock, batter and fry it to a crisp golden brown, and deliver your culinary masterpiece back to Hildelana, who will see that it finds a proper home in the belly of a peckish faire-goer.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.
